items.summary: Create a new `MindfulnessGuide` component (e.g., `frontend/src/components/MindfulnessGuide.tsx`) that encapsulates everything related to the meditation guide section currently rendered inside `PreMeditationPage`: its outer container, title, step content, and the `MeditationGuideStepper` (or equivalent inline rendering). The component should accept the current meditation type (and any content data it needs) as props.

Move the **More Details** button and its navigation logic (routing/redirecting to the Knowledge page) entirely inside the `MindfulnessGuide` component. `PreMeditationPage` must not contain any routing call or handler related to the More Details action.

Move the **Previous** and **Next** step-navigation button logic (current step index state, increment/decrement handlers, boundary conditions) entirely inside the `MindfulnessGuide` component. The component manages its own step state internally.

Update `PreMeditationPage` to replace all extracted guide-related markup and state with a single `<MindfulnessGuide meditationType={...} />` usage. Ensure no orphaned state variables, handlers, or JSX fragments related to the guide remain in `PreMeditationPage`.
